message:
fix: harden retention age arithmetic, clean up unused imports, and add sparkline snapshot API

- retention: change count_old_messages max_age_days from i64 to u64 with checked
  conversion via try_from + try_days, preventing panic on extreme/negative values;
  add test for u64::MAX safety; remove unused glob::Pattern import
- search_cache: add VecDeque to import list (previously missing for FIFO eviction)
- tracking: add VecDeque import; simplify TableId::from_index to remove redundant
  unwrap_or(Unknown) wrapper since from_index already returns Unknown for invalid indices
- console: add SparklineBuffer::snapshot() convenience method; move VecDeque import
  to module level; remove unused Sparkline and AtomicU64 imports
- beads: update issue tracker metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
